ns0:entry.ns0:title: Donchitos/Claude-Code-Game-Studios
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Donchitos/Claude-Code-Game-Studios
Language: shell
Turn Claude Code into a full game dev studio — 48 AI agents, 36 workflow skills, and a complete coordination system mirroring real studio hierarchy.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jarvesusaram99/termux-hacklab
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jarvesusaram99/termux-hacklab
Language: shell
Turn your Android into a GPU-accelerated Linux hacking lab with one command! XFCE Desktop + Nmap, SQLMap, Hydra, Wine & more. No root required.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kholia/OSX-KVM
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kholia/OSX-KVM
Language: shell
Run macOS on QEMU/KVM. With OpenCore + Monterey + Ventura + Sonoma support now! Only commercial (paid) support is available now to avoid spammy issues. No Mac system is required.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nvm-sh/nvm
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nvm-sh/nvm
Language: shell
Node Version Manager - POSIX-compliant bash script to manage multiple active node.js versions

ns0:entry.ns0:title: obra/superpowers
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/obra/superpowers
Language: shell
An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ohmyzsh/ohmyzsh
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ohmyzsh/ohmyzsh
Language: shell
🙃 A delightful community-driven (with 2,400+ contributors) framework for managing your zsh configuration. Includes 300+ optional plugins (rails, git, macOS, hub, docker, homebrew, node, php, python, etc), 140+ themes to spice up your morning, and an auto-update tool that makes it easy to keep up with the latest updates from the community.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: termux/termux-packages
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/termux/termux-packages
Language: shell
A package build system for Termux.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: youngyangyang04/leetcode-master
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/youngyangyang04/leetcode-master
Language: shell
《代码随想录》LeetCode 刷题攻略：200道经典题目刷题顺序，共60w字的详细图解，视频难点剖析，50余张思维导图，支持C++，Java，Python，Go，JavaScript等多语言版本，从此算法学习不再迷茫！🔥🔥 来看看，你会发现相见恨晚！🚀
